qa_note: The Lazy Goat atlas now uses the exact Gugu Gaga normalization method. Every non-jump populated cell is rebuilt with the shared 185/198 scale and alpha-safe sharpening. All five jump cells are exactly 185px tall, use the 0/11/18/11/0px bounded arc, and preserve the original five-pose order. The v2 atlas remains 8x11 cells with no clipping or transparent-edge residue.
